titleStmt.title: SII 34.58: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 58. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Tribhuvanavīradēva (Kulōttuṅga III), 33rd year, Mithuna, badi, 9, Monday, Rēvati = A.D. 1211, June 6, Monday.

Lines built in and incomplete. A sale of land for tax arrears, similar to that of the above inscription (No. 57), by the daughter mentioned therein. This land was located in the dēvadāna village Tribhuvanamādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. It is said the seller had got the land from her mother as śrīdhanam. Built in at the bottom.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu vīrar Abhiṣekamum vicaiyar Abhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrītribhuvaṉa vīradevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu mūṉṟāvatu mituna nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyun tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa IrEvati nāḷ vaṭakarai vikkiramacOḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Aṇṭāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu tiruvai
ṇṇāka koṇṭu nilavilai pramāṇa Icaivu tīṭṭu Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṅkaḷ caṇṭēśvarap peruvilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Innāyanār devatānam tribhuvanamādevi ccaturvveti maṅkalattu Eṅkaḷ mātākkaḷ Antappulapperumāḷ pakkal śrītaṉam peṟṟa ṉutāy nāṉ Aṉupavittu varukiṟa pottakappaṭi nilam mukkāl Iṉṉilam mukkālukkum Irupattu nāḷ
tu yeṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa � mukkāl Innilam mukkālum Innāyanāṟku caṇṭēśvarap peruvilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttukkoḷḷa Emmilicainta vi ṟṟum ṟku Ikkācu patiṉaiyyāyirattu Eṇṇūṟṟukkum viṟṟukkuṭu
Digital edition of SII 34.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
